name: PlugMem
description: Long-term memory for LLM agents — store and recall experiences across sessions

apiKey.description: API key for PlugMem service authentication

defaultGraphId.description: Default memory graph ID to use when not specified per-call

sharedReadGraphIds.description: Extra graph IDs always included in recall fan-out (read-only). Typically a user-level semantic graph shared across agents.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests
